properties.Test Case: Paste in this text: "word joiner: x⁠x zero width nonjoiner: x‌xc". With cursor in the text box, hold down CTRL+SHIFT+SPACE. Verify that you see the invisibles. More samples are at https://issues.bloomlibrary.org/youtrack/issue/BL-12495/Improve-Show-Invisibles, but you don't need to test individual ones.

properties.Test Case: Right click on book and test all functions. Note: BL-9495 is a bug we're willing to live with. Note that Export to Word of Sample Shell books is broken as of 6.2 (see BL-15728).
properties.Steps: Right click on book and test all functions. Note: BL-9495 is a bug we're willing to live with. Note that Export to Word of Sample Shell books is broken as of 6.2 (see BL-15728).

properties.Test Case: Test that right-click on book thumbnail brings up the correct menu items: - Books in Collection: Rename Book [N.B. for a Team Collection, this is active only if book is Checked Out to you, otherwise greyed out); Duplicate Book; Show in File Explorer; Delete Book [N.B. for a Team Collection, only if book is Checked Out to you); More > - Templates and Sample Shells --> no menu - Books From BloomLibrary.org : Show in File Explorer; Delete Book - Books from other Collections (added via "Show another collection..." button) : Show in File Explorer; Move into {current collection}
properties.Steps:
Test that right-click on book thumbnail brings up the correct menu items:
- Books in Collection: Rename Book [N.B. for a Team Collection, this is active only if book is Checked Out to you, otherwise greyed out); Duplicate Book; Show in File Explorer; Delete Book [N.B. for a Team Collection, only if book is Checked Out to you); More >
- Templates and Sample Shells  --> no menu
- Books From BloomLibrary.org : Show in File Explorer; Delete Book
- Books from other Collections (added via "Show another collection..." button) : Show in File Explorer; Move into {current collection}

properties.Test Case: For books in Collection, after selecting a thumbnail, a triangle should appear on the bottom right corner. Clicking this gives the same options as the right-click. Test functionality.
